Description: Pilot Flying J-branded fuel dealer / travel center at I-65 Exit 7 (SR 60) in Sellersburg, co-located with the Kenworth of Sellersburg dealership. Listed with diesel lanes, DEF, showers, restrooms, food, Wi-Fi and truck parking.
Certified CAT Scale located at the Pro Stop / Pilot Flying J dealer travel center at I-65 Exit 7 in Sellersburg.

Kenworth/Palmer Trucks full-service truck dealership at I-65 Exit 7 offering heavy-duty truck service, OEM repairs, parts and mobile diagnostics (PACCAR, Cummins, CAT). Co-located with the Pro Stop travel center at 1503 Avco Blvd. Service department hours Mon-Fri 7:00a-4:00p.

Commercial truck/OTR/ag tire dealer and service center on US-31 south of Clark Regional Airport, with 24/7 emergency truck tire service. Reached from I-65 via Exit 4 (northbound) or Exit 7 (southbound), roughly 3-4 miles along US-31.

Business Name: Travelodge by Wyndham Sellersburg / Louisville North
Description: Budget hotel just off I-65 Exit 7 in Sellersburg that advertises ample free parking for trucks and RVs, plus free Wi-Fi and a seasonal outdoor pool.

Business Name: Ramada by Wyndham Sellersburg / Louisville North
Description: Hotel off I-65 Exit 7 in Sellersburg that advertises free parking for trucks, buses, RVs and campers, with an indoor pool and free breakfast.
Fenced, gated, video-monitored storage facility on US-31 about 1-2 miles from I-65 Exit 7 that offers semi-trailer and RV parking, bookable via Truck Parking Club.

Fenced gravel truck & trailer parking lot on Avco Blvd with 24/7 access, immediately off I-65 Exit 7 near the Pro Stop / Kenworth of Sellersburg. Bookable hourly, daily, weekly or monthly through Truck Parking Club.
Mobile truck and trailer repair service covering the Sellersburg / Jeffersonville / Louisville-Southern Indiana area along I-65; phones answered 24 hours.
24/7 mobile truck repair, trailer, reefer and tire service dispatched to the Clarksville / Jeffersonville I-65 area.

TravelCenters of America full-service travel center at I-65 Exit 50A (US-50) in Seymour. Offers 184 truck parking spaces, 9 diesel fuel lanes, 10 showers, restaurant, laundry, driver lounge, a CAT Scale and an on-site TA Truck Service shop.

AMBEST independent truck stop at I-65 Exit 34 in Austin (Scott County), fully rebuilt and reopened after a major renovation. Offers about 30 truck parking spaces, 6 fuel lanes, 3 showers, deli/food, bulk DEF, ATM, a lighted paved lot and a CAT Scale.
Independent Marathon-branded fuel stop at I-65 Exit 41 (SR-250 / Uniontown) near Crothersville. Offers roughly 50 truck parking spaces, a convenience store and on-site repair; accepts CFN fuel cards.
Certified CAT Scale located at the TA Seymour travel center, I-65 Exit 50A. Open 24 hours for truck weighing.
CAT Scale located at the rebuilt Fuel Mart #783 truck stop at I-65 Exit 34 in Austin.

Business Name: Truck Parking Club - Seymour (1001 S Commerce Dr)
Description: Reservable truck and trailer parking lot in the Truck Parking Club network near I-65 Exit 50, adjacent to the Commerce Drive corridor and TA Seymour. Offers 24/7 access; drivers can book by the hour, day, week or month.
INDOT public rest area on southbound I-65 near mile marker 22 (Henryville area, north of Exit 19). Provides restrooms, vending and picnic area with approximately 64 truck parking spaces.
INDOT public rest area on northbound I-65 near mile marker 22 in the Henryville area, reported to offer restrooms and roughly 64 truck parking spaces.
On-site full-service truck repair shop at TA Seymour (I-65 Exit 50A) with 6 service bays, offering tire, mechanical and preventive maintenance plus roadside assistance, open 24 hours.
Family-owned 24/7 towing, recovery and repair company in Scottsburg (I-65 Exit 29 area), with light, medium and heavy-duty towing for tractor-trailers plus mobile and tire service.
24-hour towing and roadside assistance company in Seymour (I-65 Exit 50 area) handling cars and trucks, flat tires and jump-starts.

Commercial tire dealer and service center near I-65 Exit 50 on the Commerce Drive corridor in Seymour. Sells and services medium/heavy truck tires (Bridgestone, Firestone, Goodyear, Michelin and more) and offers 24-hour roadside tire service.
Budget hotel just off I-65 Exit 50B (US-50) in Seymour that offers on-site truck parking and coin laundry, convenient for drivers overnighting in the corridor.
Hotel at I-65 Exit 50B (E Tipton St) in Seymour reported by a travel directory to offer a well-lit lot with large-truck parking.

Indiana State Police weigh station on northbound I-65 near mile marker 52, about 1.5 miles north of US-50 (Exit 50) in Jackson County. A newer mainline weigh-in-motion facility with certified static scales and an inspection barn; PrePass/PreClear available.
